name: skin-pixel
title: 8-bit Pixel skin
description: 8-bit concept skin: stepped pixel bevels, Press Start 2P, retro palette, CRT scanlines. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="pixel"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/pixel.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="pixel" on <html>.
